claim: No Stable, release, complete accessibility, package-parity, performance-scale, or publication claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: Named section, filter button group, ordered notifications, article items, native checkboxes and buttons.
semantics.rolePolicy: Queued updates and read announcements create live regions only when explicitly enabled.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through filters, selection, item and recovery controls in document order.
Activates focused native buttons and checkboxes.

nonColor: Unread count, mark-read labels, structural borders and text accompany the green unread mark.
responsive: Actions wrap below content at narrow widths; logical properties preserve RTL and zoom order.
consumerResponsibilities: Persist read state, authorize bulk operations and own routing, transport, retention and notification privacy.
For virtualization, supply a window that preserves the active/focused item and verify large-data performance.
Localize visible/spoken text and retest screen readers, keyboard, touch, zoom, RTL and forced colors.
Do not claim Stable until every promotion delta has current evidence.
